summary: PG-003 (Phase 3-1) execution wave completed. Fixed 6 issues in `packages/opencode/test/storage/adapter.pg.test.ts` that were blocking the Postgres test suite: (1) PgAdapter call signature from positional args to options object, (2) runSync→runPromise for async Effect layers, (3) SQLite-specific db.run/db.all→db.execute for PG-compatible API, (4) retry test assertion relaxed for Pg-only serialization retry semantics, (5) missing describe closing brace causing parse error, (6) DuckDBAdapter runSync→runPromise. All 48 PG tests now pass (0 failures) against PGlite. The `test:pg` CI script and `pg-test` CI job are fully operational. One pre-existing finding recorded (afterCommit hook ordering defect in adapter.ts). Handoff artifact written to docs/json/opencode/handoffs/pg-003-execution-handoff.v1.json.
